scripts.refresh-db: bun run update-db && (git diff --quiet compromised-db.json || git commit -m 'chore: refresh compromised-db.json' compromised-db.json)
scripts.release:patch: bun run refresh-db && npm version patch && npm publish && git push --follow-tags
scripts.release:minor: bun run refresh-db && npm version minor && npm publish && git push --follow-tags
scripts.release:major: bun run refresh-db && npm version major && npm publish && git push --follow-tags
